_description: Avatar metadata for Higgsfield UGC generation. Add one entry per image file. Leonardo reads this via pick-avatar.py.

_fields.vibe: casual | aspirational | professional | energetic | relatable | tech-savvy
_fields.ethnicity_hint: Optional free-text hint for model consistency (e.g. 'South Asian', 'East Asian'). Not used for filtering — for human reference only.
_fields.recommended_for: Array of UGC archetypes this avatar works well for: confessional | day-in-the-life | reaction | demo
